title: Browser support
description:
These are the (most interesting) web platform features used by Open Props
    UI! If you're here concerned about what components you actually can use
    today, this should hopefully get you more informed.

title: Why Open Props UI?
description:
A CSS UI library exploring how next-gen HTML & CSS features can change the
    way we create components. Designed to be used by professional teams as well
    as tinkering hobbyists.
headings: Backstory The goal of OPUI

title: Why Open Props UI?
description:
A CSS UI library exploring how next-gen HTML & CSS features can change the
    way we create components. Designed to be used by professional teams as well
    as tinkering hobbyists.
headings: Backstory The goal of OPUI

title: Why Open Props UI?
description:
A CSS UI library exploring how next-gen HTML & CSS features can change the

title: Getting started
description:
OPUI ships first-class Astro components. Install the package, import what
    you need, and you're set.
headings: Install via NPM Use a component Load the CSS

title: Getting started
description:
Open Props UI is a CSS UI library exploring how next-gen HTML & CSS features
    can change the way we create components. Designed to be used by professional
    teams as well as tinkering hobbyists.
headings: Install manually theme.css generator Install via NPM Usage Install via CDN

title: Getting started
description:
OPUI ships Vue 3 single-file components. Install the package, import what
    you need, and you're set.
headings: Install via NPM Use a component Load the CSS

title: Accordion API
headings: Group Card[role="group"] - name string - open boolean false Accordion open state. variant "default" The visual variant of the accordion.

headings: Accordion details.ui-accordion - Group .ui-card[role="group"] - Attribute name - Part - Optional wrappers for child content. Variants .ui-text The variant to use.

title: Accordion API
headings: Group Card[role="group"] - name string - open boolean false Accordion open state. variant "default" The visual variant of the accordion.

title: Anchor API
headings: alignment string "start end" trigger "always" | "hover" "always"

title: Anchor API
headings: Container .ui-anchor - Floating .ui-anchor-floating - Position --anchor-position-area start end Trigger data-trigger="hover" -

title: Anchor API
headings: alignment string "start end" trigger "always" | "hover" "always"

title: Avatar API
headings: as any - The element or component to render as. href string - The link to use if the avatar is an anchor. variant "squared" | "rounded" | "squircle" "default" The visual style of the avatar. isGroup boolean false Renders the avatar as a group. src string - The image source for the avatar. alt string - The alternative text for the avatar image.

title: Avatar API
headings: Variants - Sets the shape of the avatar. Container [role="group"] - Required for grouped avatars.

title: Avatar API
headings: as any - The element or component to render as. href string - The link to use if the avatar is an anchor. variant "squared" | "rounded" | "squircle" "default" The visual style of the avatar. isGroup boolean false Renders the avatar as a group. src string - The image source for the avatar. alt string - The alternative text for the avatar image.

title: Badge API
headings: alignment - color - The color variant of the badge. dot boolean false Renders the badge as a simple dot. invisible boolean false Hides the badge. label string | number - default The element the badge is anchored to. indicator

title: Badge API
headings: Container .ui-anchor.ui-badge - Floating .ui-anchor-floating - Positioned floating container from Anchor. Indicator .ui-badge-indicator - Alignment - Color - Color modifiers on .ui-badge. Variants .ui-dot - Shape modifier on .ui-badge. Visibility .ui-invisible - Visibility modifier on .ui-badge.

title: Badge API
headings: alignment - color - The color variant of the badge. dot boolean false Renders the badge as a simple dot. invisible boolean false Hides the badge. label string | number - default The element the badge is anchored to. indicator

title: Button Group API
description: Reference for Button Group Astro component.
headings: color "critical", "primary" - orientation "vertical" - The layout orientation of the group. size "small" | "large" - The size of the buttons in the group. variant "outlined" | "tonal" | "filled" - The visual style of the buttons in the group.

description: Reference for Button Group Vue component.

title: Button API
headings: size "small", "large" - The size of the button. variant - The visual variant of the button. color "critical", "primary" - href string - disabled boolean - Button disabled state.

title: Button API
headings: Sizes - The size of the element. Variants - The variant to use. Colors - Color modifiers. Default is a neutral gray.

title: Button API
headings: size "small", "large" - The size of the button. variant - The visual variant of the button. color "critical", "primary" - href string - disabled boolean - Button disabled state.

headings: Slots - Optional slots. actionsAlign "start", "end" - Alignment for the actions slot. variant "text" The variant to use.

title: Card API
headings: Slots - Optional slots. actionsAlign "start", "end" - Alignment for the actions slot. variant "text" The variant to use.

title: Checkbox API
headings: checked boolean false Input checked state. disabled boolean - Input disabled state. error boolean - Input error state. hideLabel boolean - Visually hides the label. indeterminate boolean false required boolean false Input required state. size "small" | "large" - The size of the input. spread boolean false Spreads the label and input to opposite ends. stack boolean false Stacks the label under the input. default The label text for the component. end-text

title: Drawer API
headings:
id string auto-generated Unique identifier. Defaults to a stable auto-generated id when omitted. side "inline-start", "inline-end",
        "block-start", "block-end" "inline-start" The side it opens from. backdrop "transparent", "blurred" "blurred" The backdrop style. scrollLock boolean true Whether to lock page scroll. class string - Optional CSS class. closedby "any", "closerequest", "none" "any" How the drawer is closed. heading - - The drawer title. default - - Main content area. actions - - Bottom action area. actions

title: Drawer API
headings:
Sides .ui-inline-start, .ui-inline-end,
        .ui-block-start, .ui-block-end .ui-inline-start The side it opens from. Close behavior closedby="any", closedby="closerequest",
        closedby="none" closedby="any" How the drawer is closed. Backdrop .ui-backdrop-transparent - Removes the backdrop blur. Autofocus autofocus - Focuses the drawer container (or a specific element) when opened.
        Prevents focus from jumping to the first focusable element. .ui-header - - Top area for titles. .ui-content - - Main content area. .ui-actions - - Bottom action area.

title: Drawer API
headings:
id string auto-generated Unique identifier. Defaults to a stable auto-generated id when omitted. side "inline-start", "inline-end",
        "block-start", "block-end" "inline-start" The side it opens from. backdrop "transparent", "blurred" "blurred" The backdrop style. scrollLock boolean true Whether to lock page scroll. class string - Optional CSS class. closedby "any", "closerequest", "none" "any" How the drawer is closed. heading - - The drawer title. default - - Main content area. actions - - Bottom action area. actions

title: Form API
headings: Base .ui-form - The main form container. Base .ui-fieldset - The field set container. Modifiers [disabled] - Whether the field set is disabled. Base .ui-legend, legend - The label for the field set. Base .ui-field-description - Field description for the field set. Base .ui-field-group - Container for related input components. Variants .ui-row, default - The orientation of the field group.

title: Icon Button API
description: Reference for Icon Button Vue component.
headings: as any The underlying HTML element. href string - size "small" - The size of the icon button. color "critical", "primary" - variant - The style of the icon button. disabled boolean - Whether the icon button is disabled.

title: List API
headings: bordered boolean false Adds a border between list items. dense boolean false Packs the list tighter. gutterless boolean false Removes list inline padding. variant "default" | "tonal" | "transparent" - The background color variant of the list. as string - borderTop boolean false List item top border. headline string - The main text for the list item. inset boolean false Aligns with items that have a start icon. supportingText string - Extra text displayed below the headline.

title: List API
headings: Dense .ui-dense - When enabled list appears tighter packed. Gutterless .ui-gutterless - When enabled list inline padding is removed. Bordered .ui-bordered - Variants - Background color variants. Main parts - Building blocks in List item. Inset .ui-inset - Border top .ui-border-top - When enabled the list item will get a top border.

title: List API
headings: bordered boolean false Adds a border between list items. dense boolean false Packs the list tighter. gutterless boolean false Removes list inline padding. variant "default" | "tonal" | "transparent" - The background color variant of the list. as string - borderTop boolean false List item top border. headline string - The main text for the list item. inset boolean false Aligns with items that have a start icon. supportingText string - Extra text displayed below the headline.

title: Progress API

title: Range API
headings:
label string - The label for the range input. startText string - endText string - Informational text below the range input. spread boolean false Spreads the label/text and input to opposite ends.

title: Select API

title: Spinner API
headings: aria-busy - Sizes font-size 1em Excluded - Elements that never receive a spinner.

title: Spinner API
headings: State aria-busy="true" - Sizes font-size on the element 1em Excluded - Elements that never receive a spinner.

title: Spinner API
headings: aria-busy - Sizes font-size 1em Excluded - Elements that never receive a spinner.

title: Switch API
headings: aria-label string - aria-labelledby string - ID of an external element that labels the switch. checked boolean false Whether the switch is checked. disabled boolean false Whether the switch is disabled. error boolean false Switch error state. hideLabel boolean false Visually hides the label but keeps it accessible. required boolean false Whether the switch is required. small boolean false Reduces the size of the switch. spread boolean false Spreads the label and switch to opposite ends. stack boolean false Labels are stacked under the element. default The label text for the switch. end-text

title: Switch API
headings: Children - Optional children. Sizes .ui-small, default - The size of the element. Layout - Validation [data-invalid] - When applied, error styles are shown.

title: Table API
headings: class string - Additional CSS classes to apply to the table. variant "dense" | "spacious" - The variant to use.

title: Table API
headings: Table <table class="ui-table"> - The native HTML table element. Dense .ui-dense - When applied the table will appear denser. Spacious .ui-spacious - When applied the table will appear more spacious.

headings: class string - Additional CSS classes to apply to the table. variant "dense" | "spacious" - The variant to use.

title: Tabs API
headings: class "ui-tabs" Required class for the parent container. role "tablist" Required for accessibility. type "radio" Required for state management. class "ui-tab-input" Required for behavior and styling. name string Shared across all tabs in the group. checked boolean Applied to the initially active tab. aria-controls ID Should match the ID of the corresponding panel. class "ui-tab-label" Required for behavior and styling. for ID Must match the ID of the radio input. role "tab" Required for accessibility. class "ui-tab-panel" Required for behavior and styling. role "tabpanel" Required for accessibility. aria-labelledby ID Should match the ID of the corresponding trigger.

title: Tabs API
headings: class string - Additional class names. name string "tabs-XXXX" open boolean false Whether this tab is initially active. class string - Optional class name. class string - Optional class name.
